name: People Trust Community
description_short: People.com is a celebrity news and entertainment website, not a financial services company. The categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is factually incorrect.
description_long: People.com is a celebrity news, gossip, and entertainment publication owned by Dotdash Meredith. It is not a financial services provider, lending company, or alternative financial product company. The website exclusively publishes celebrity news, exclusive interviews, photo galleries, video content, and entertainment journalism covering topics such as celebrity relationships, weddings, health news, award shows, and pop culture. The content includes sections on celebrity families, crime news involving public figures, entertainment industry news, and lifestyle features. There is no financial product, lending service, credit-building tool, or payday alternative offering on this website. The categorization of People.com as a 'payday-alternatives' company appears to be a data entry or classification error. This is a consumer-facing entertainment media publication, not a fintech company or credit union. The website requires no financial qualifications, does not collect personal financial information, and does not facilitate any transactions related to credit, lending, or financial services. Any attempt to use this website as a source for consumer finance products would be misguided.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
cons: Not a financial services provider — this is purely an entertainment news website
No lending products, credit services, or financial tools available
Miscategorized on CreditDoc — belongs in media/entertainment, not consumer finance
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: This company should not be listed on CreditDoc at all. People.com is a celebrity entertainment news outlet with zero financial products or services. The category assignment is factually incorrect and should be removed or corrected to reflect its actual business model.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
